final:
module top_module (
        input k,
        input l,
        input m,
  wire temp1_( ~k & ~l & ~m ) |
           ( ~k & ~l & m ) |
           ( k & ~l & ~m ) = ( ~k & ~l & ~m ) |
           ( ~k & ~l & m ) |
           ( k & ~l & ~m );
  wire temp2_( k & ~l & m ) = ( k & ~l & m );
  assign n = temp1_( ~k & ~l & ~m ) |
           ( ~k & ~l & m ) |
           ( k & ~l & ~m ) | temp2_( k & ~l & m );

endmodule
